all its schemes in one venture capital undertaking:

sentence_window:
(3) Investment by an angel fund in the venture capital undertaking shall be locked-in for a
period of 116[one year]. (4) Angel funds shall not invest in associates. (5) Angel funds shall not invest more than twenty-five per cent of the total investments under
all its schemes in one venture capital undertaking:
notification no. G.S.R. 180(E) dated February 17, 2016 or such other policy made in this regard which may be in
force;]
*Substituted for the words “have been incorporated during the preceding three years from the date of such investment;”
by the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Alternative Investment Funds) (Amendment) Regulations, 2016, w.e.f. 04-01-2017.”
113 Omitted by the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Alternative Investment Funds) (Second Amendment)
Regulations, 2021, w.e.f. 05-05-2021.
